channel.title: 9ja News Pluse
channel.description: Latest news updates from 9ja News Pluse

item.title: ADC Unveils UK-Based Don as Delta Governorship Candidate
item.description: Delta State’s political chessboard just added a wildcard. The African Democratic Congress has anointed Dr. Emmanuel Unuafe, a United Kingdom-based ...

item.title: Finnish Champions Sign Nigerian Striker
item.description: HJK Helsinki has secured Nigerian teenager David Temidayo Olorunfemi. The 33-time champions outmaneuvered rivals from Denmark and Sweden to clinch ...

item.title: **APC Denies Return Tickets to Deputy Speaker, 15 Niger Assembly Lawmakers**
item.description: Deputy Speaker of the Niger State House of Assembly and the only female legislator, Mrs. Affiniki Dauda, along with 15 others, has been denied retu...

item.title: Flamingos Captain Declares: 'God Healed Me' After Injury Recovery
item.description: Flamingos captain Chidi Harmony has expressed her heartfelt gratitude to God following her recovery from a debilitating injury. Harmony's return co...

item.title: Nwoko Crashes Out, Okowa Wins APC Primary
item.description: In a shocking turn of events, Senator Ned Nwoko has lost the All Progressives Congress (APC) primary election to former Delta State governor, Ifean...

item.title: God Healed Me, Now We Crush Guinea
item.description: So, get this, Chidi Harmony, captain of the Flamingos, is back in action. Yeah, she was out with an injury, missed the whole FIFA U-17 Women’s Worl...

item.title: Nwoko Crashes in APC Primary, Okowa Triumphs
item.description: In a surprising turn of events, Senator Ned Nwoko, despite his heavy campaigning and political influence, suffered a crushing defeat in the All Pro...

item.title: Nigeria's Flamingos Captain Bounces Back from Injury, Guinea Better Watch Out
item.description: Captain Harmony back on her feet, injury nightmare over, got her eye on the prize, Guinea's gonna feel the heat, no more sitting on the sidelines, ...

item.title: Supreme Court Shocker: How the New ADC & PDP Rulings Just Rewrote the 2027 Playbook
item.description: For months, the power struggle behind closed doors was just a whisper. Today, the Supreme Court turned it into an earthquake.

item.title: The Osimhen Era: Why Galatasaray’s Leadership Crisis Ends Without a Captain’s Armband
item.description: Victor Osimhen’s influence at Galatasaray goes beyond goals as he reshapes leadership dynamics inside the club during their title push.

item.title: Istanbul Derby Report: How Galatasaray’s 3-0 Win Was Decided in Two Moments
item.description: A tactical breakdown of Galatasaray’s 3-0 victory over Fenerbahçe, showing how small moments decided a title-defining match.

item.title: The Arsenal-Osimhen Wage Trap: Why the £100m Fee is Only the Tip of the Iceberg
item.description: A deep financial breakdown of Arsenal’s potential Osimhen transfer and the wage structure risks behind the deal.
